problem id: e89851b9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11001101 -> 10000111
  01100110 -> 01011011
  10000010 -> 10010111
  01011001 -> 01001010
  11111001 -> 01000111
  01010100 -> 00111010
  10011101 -> 10000110
  11100000 -> 11110111
  11101110 -> 11010111
  00110101 -> 00001101

query: 00111001
predicted answer: 01001101
